title: deguelia rufescens
intro: Deguelia rufescens, also known as the African dog tooth, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimalarial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Deguelia rufescens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts have also been used in traditional medicine.
